<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Updating the flashcards skill to use high school level vocabulary.

Vocabulary guidance will be added to the skill description, voice section, quality checklist, and de-AI pass. Cards should use plain, everyday words familiar to high school students, avoiding jargon and academic terms.

A dedicated vocabulary section will be added to the flashcards skill. Technical PKM terms may remain if they match the note's own vocabulary. Abstract nouns like "repository" or "utilization" will be avoided. The jorap-voice skill will be updated minimally since flashcards cross-reference it.

Cards must be readable on the first pass. Every word should be familiar to a high school student. Replace academic terms like "utilize" with "use" and "repository" with "inbox". Avoid words a friend would not say out loud. Keep technical deck terms only when they are the core move being drilled.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Updated the **flashcards** skill with high-school-level vocabulary as a hard rule. Changes:

**`SKILL.md`**
- Skill description now calls out high-school vocabulary
- New **Vocabulary** line under Voice at the top
- De-AI workflow step now includes vocab swaps (`utilize` → `use`, etc.)
- New **Vocabulary (high school level)** section with rules, swap table, and a 15-year-old read-aloud test
- Quality checklist item: no jargon or thesaurus words a typical teen wouldn't say out loud

**`examples.md`**
- Vocabulary step added to the rewrite pass
- New **Vocabulary - high school level** section with fancy → plain examples

Spine terms like `inbox`, `evergreen`, and `wikilink` stay when they're the actual move being drilled. Everything else should use everyday words you'd say out loud under pressure.

_**Agent (default)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Grep only found the backs. The fronts may be on separate lines.</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

Extracting full card pairs and scanning for vocabulary and cue→apply issues.


_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re, yaml, glob, os

# Words that are too fancy / academic for high school level flashcards
FANCY = re.compile(
    r'\b(utilize|facilitate|reconcile|disseminate|repository|prioritize|implement|leverage|'
    r'remediation|compliance|discipleship|righteousness|merit|unmerited|trespass|'
    r'proximity|initiative|fellowship|manipulation|retaliation|non-retaliation|'
    r'discern|condemn|peacemaking|reconciliation|express deadline|distill|'
    r'taxonomy|atomic|citable|grafted|compliance|hollow worship|self-righteousness|'
    r'mammon|merit math|performance content|Collector\'s Fallacy|Resources|Projects|Areas|Archive)\b',
    re.I
)

# Principle-only / weak apply patterns
WEAK_BACK = re.compile(
    r'^(Extends\.|Contradicts\.|Implements\.|Alternative\.|Index \(MOC\)\.|'
    r'Poor in spirit|Meek|Mourn|Hunger for righteousness|Kingdom of heaven|'
    r'Resources - until claimed|Projects - or|Areas - not|Archive -|'
    r'Childlike receive|Receive like a child|Trust receives|'
    r'Father alone|Give in secret|Pray in secret|Fast in secret|'
    r'Narrow - hard road|Broad self-righteousness|'
    r'The vital ~20%|~20% spine|Shorthand ratio)\.',
    re.I
)

files = sorted(glob.glob('content/english/notes/*.md'))
issues = []

for path in files:
    with open(path) as f:
        text = f.read()
    if 'review: true' not in text and 'cards:' not in text:
        continue
    if path.endswith('cards.md'):
        continue
    m = re.search(r'^cards:\s*\n((?:\s+-.*\n)+)', text, re.M)
    if not m:
        continue
    # parse yaml cards block
    block = 'cards:\n' + m.group(1)
    try:
        data = yaml.safe_load(block)
    except Exception as e:
        issues.append((path, 'YAML', str(e)))
        continue
    cards = data.get('cards', [])
    for i, card in enumerate(cards, 1):
        front = card.get('front', '')
        back = card.get('back', '')
        problems = []
        if len(front) <= len(back):
            problems.append('front not longer than back')
        fancy_f = FANCY.findall(front)
        fancy_b = FANCY.findall(back)
        if fancy_f:
            problems.append(f'fancy front: {fancy_f}')
        if fancy_b:
            problems.append(f'fancy back: {fancy_b}')
        if WEAK_BACK.match(back.strip()):
            problems.append('weak/principle-only back')
        if re.search(r'\bor\b.*\?', front, re.I):
            problems.append('multiple choice?')
        if problems:
            issues.append((os.path.basename(path), i, front[:80], back[:60], problems))

print(f'Total issues: {len(issues)}\n')
for item in issues:
    if len(item) == 3:
        print(item)
    else:
        fname, num, front, back, probs = item
        print(f'{fname} #{num}: {probs}')
        print(f'  F: {front}')
        print(f'  B: {back}')
        print()
PYEOF</summary>

```bash
cd /home/jorap/Documents/GitHub/jorap.com && python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re, yaml, glob, os

# Words that are too fancy / academic for high school level flashcards
FANCY = re.compile(
    r'\b(utilize|facilitate|reconcile|disseminate|repository|prioritize|implement|leverage|'
    r'remediation|compliance|discipleship|righteousness|merit|unmerited|trespass|'
    r'proximity|initiative|fellowship|manipulation|retaliation|non-retaliation|'
    r'discern|condemn|peacemaking|reconciliation|express deadline|distill|'
    r'taxonomy|atomic|citable|grafted|compliance|hollow worship|self-righteousness|'
    r'mammon|merit math|performance content|Collector\'s Fallacy|Resources|Projects|Areas|Archive)\b',
    re.I
)

# Principle-only / weak apply patterns
WEAK_BACK = re.compile(
    r'^(Extends\.|Contradicts\.|Implements\.|Alternative\.|Index \(MOC\)\.|'
    r'Poor in spirit|Meek|Mourn|Hunger for righteousness|Kingdom of heaven|'
    r'Resources - until claimed|Projects - or|Areas - not|Archive -|'
    r'Childlike receive|Receive like a child|Trust receives|'
    r'Father alone|Give in secret|Pray in secret|Fast in secret|'
    r'Narrow - hard road|Broad self-righteousness|'
    r'The vital ~20%|~20% spine|Shorthand ratio)\.',
    re.I
)

files = sorted(glob.glob('content/english/notes/*.md'))
issues = []

for path in files:
    with open(path) as f:
        text = f.read()
    if 'review: true' not in text and 'cards:' not in text:
        continue
    if path.endswith('cards.md'):
        continue
    m = re.search(r'^cards:\s*\n((?:\s+-.*\n)+)', text, re.M)
    if not m:
        continue
    # parse yaml cards block
    block = 'cards:\n' + m.group(1)
    try:
        data = yaml.safe_load(block)
    except Exception as e:
        issues.append((path, 'YAML', str(e)))
        continue
    cards = data.get('cards', [])
    for i, card in enumerate(cards, 1):
        front = card.get('front', '')
        back = card.get('back', '')
        problems = []
        if len(front) <= len(back):
            problems.append('front not longer than back')
        fancy_f = FANCY.findall(front)
        fancy_b = FANCY.findall(back)
        if fancy_f:
            problems.append(f'fancy front: {fancy_f}')
        if fancy_b:
            problems.append(f'fancy back: {fancy_b}')
        if WEAK_BACK.match(back.strip()):
            problems.append('weak/principle-only back')
        if re.search(r'\bor\b.*\?', front, re.I):
            problems.append('multiple choice?')
        if problems:
            issues.append((os.path.basename(path), i, front[:80], back[:60], problems))

print(f'Total issues: {len(issues)}\n')
for item in issues:
    if len(item) == 3:
        print(item)
    else:
        fname, num, front, back, probs = item
        print(f'{fname} #{num}: {probs}')
        print(f'  F: {front}')
        print(f'  B: {back}')
        print()
PYEOF
```
